overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a character walking through a futuristic urban coastal district. The scene transitions from a sunny amusement park area with a prominent ferris wheel to a graffiti-lined sidewalk, ending at an intersection as weather deteriorates into heavy fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: amusement park entrance with ferris wheel

events.description: character steps onto sidewalk and continues walking along the street
ferris wheel exits view as character moves past the amusement park area

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk away from the ferris wheel, moving into a more enclosed street corridor

notable_agents.action: character in shorts standing near the crosswalk at the start of the clip

entered.detail: large white amusement park ferris wheel with pink neon lighting at the hub
tall black traffic signal pole with red light illuminated
tall palm trees lining the street
colorful storefronts with large digital billboards

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a view of a massive ferris wheel dominating the background on a sunny day. The character walks along a city street lined with palm trees and commercial buildings, passing a traffic light before the ferris wheel disappears from view behind buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: graffiti-covered urban sidewalk with political murals

events.description: enters section with extensive wall graffiti and American flag mural
sunlight begins to dim as fog rolls in, reducing visibility

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk parallel to a graffiti-covered wall, passing various pedestrians

entered.detail: long concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti tags and street art
large painted mural of American flag with 6th Street text

segments.scene_description: The character walks alongside a long wall covered in dense graffiti including a prominent American flag mural. The environment shifts from open amusement park to an enclosed urban corridor. As the segment progresses, the clear blue sky gradually gives way to hazy conditions.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy intersection with abandoned overpass structure

events.description: heavy fog or dust storm rolls in, significantly reducing visibility and changing lighting
approaching intersection with distinctive blue building becoming prominent

agents.ego_description: walking through increasingly foggy conditions toward an intersection, passing a man talking on his phone

notable_agents.action: bearded man in yellow plaid shirt talking on phone while walking

entered.detail: two-story building with teal upper facade and dark blue lower level

segments.scene_description: The final segment features a dramatic weather shift to heavy fog or dust that obscures the sky and distant structures. The character continues along the graffiti wall, passes a pedestrian on his phone, and approaches an intersection marked by a distinctive blue building and abandoned overpass structure in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunny coastal district that gradually descends into a dense, oppressive fog. It begins on a bright city street where a massive ferris wheel dominates the skyline, with the character walking past palm trees and commercial buildings until the structures obscure the wheel from view. As the camera moves forward, the open amusement park atmosphere shifts into an enclosed urban corridor defined by a long wall of dense graffiti and a prominent American flag mural. The clear blue sky then steadily gives way to hazy conditions, eventually transforming into a heavy fog that obscures the horizon and distant architecture. The scene finally concludes as the character passes a pedestrian and approaches a city intersection marked by a distinctive blue building and an abandoned overpass.
